title: KamiKatsu: Working for God in a Godless World
sourceNotes: Single-cour, 12 episodes (Apr-Jul 2023), 0 filler. AniList reports null chapter/volume counts for both the anime and manga entries; manga is ongoing at ch. 69 across 13 volumes (~5.3 ch/volume) as of its official Hero's Web (Comiplex) serialization in July 2026. The anime adapts through ch. 38 (~vol. 7), covering Yukito founding the goddess Mitama's faith and her rival-god confrontations with Atar/Loki (eps 1-5), Dakini (eps 6-8), and Gaia (eps 9-12); per-episode chapter boundaries within each confrontation are approximate estimates from episode synopses, not a confirmed chapter-sync guide.
